title: Exhalimolobos hispidulus

The classification of Exhalimolobos hispidulus remains a topic of ongoing study in the botanical community.
uses: Exhalimolobos hispidulus, also known as hairy-leaved beardtongue, is a plant species that has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
